name: validate-all: --allow-invalid-source-folder bypass flag includes failing files in aggregation but logs the bypass to audit
command:
mkdir -p tree/google .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'source:
  id: bad
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --validate-first --allow-invalid-source-folder --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -E '"event":"bypass-allow-invalid-source-folder"' .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
